title: IIM Udaipur Head Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Head - Admissions Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Udaipur website. The last date to submit the application form is 01-06-2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Udaipur Head Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Head - Admissions Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Udaipur website. The last date to submit the application form is 01-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Post Name: Head - Admissions Qualifications: Postgraduate degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognized university. Experience: Candidates should have proven experience in: Designing and implementing admissions strategies and policies. Managing end-to-end admission processes Leading student recruitment initiatives, marketing campaigns, and outreach activities. Coordinating with faculty, academic departments, and external agencies. Managing admission analytics, applicant databases, and CRM systems. Supervising and mentoring admissions teams. Ensuring compliance with institutional policies and regulatory requirements.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Udaipur Head - Admissions Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Head - Admissions post at IIM Udaipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Head - Admissions position at IIM Udaipur is June 1, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Head - Admissions role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Postgraduate degree or its equivalent in any discipline from a university that is recognized by the government.

faq.question: Q3. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Head - Admissions post at IIM Udaipur is on a contract basis, as indicated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Head - Admissions position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Head - Admissions position is described as competitive and commensurate with the candidate's experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Head - Admissions vacancy?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIM Udaipur. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading necessary documents, and submitting it before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Where is IIM Udaipur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) is located in Udaipur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q7. What kind of experience is required for this role?
faq.answer: Proven experience is required in areas such as admissions strategy, end-to-end admission process management, student recruitment, coordination with faculty, and managing admissions teams and analytics.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age limit restrictions for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits for this particular post. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Head - Admissions post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the position of Head - Admissions at the Indian Institute of Management Udaipur.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the Head - Admissions post at IIM Udaipur must be submitted online only through the official website. Offline applications will not be accepted.
